reason: Salieri’s jealousy of Mozart’s genius drives a destructive rivalry for musical supremacy.
Boxer Jake LaMotta’s obsession with defeating his rival Sugar Ray fuels self-destructive rage.
Cutthroat salesmen vie for impossible leads, their rivalry eroding trust and sanity.
Maverick and Iceman’s dog-fight rivalry in Top Gun pushes both pilots toward dangerous extremes.
A cop and a master thief obsessively chase each other in a high-stakes cat-and-mouse game.
Young chess prodigies’ fierce battles for the top ranking bring out perfectionist extremes.
Billy the Kid and Pat Garrett’s deadly chase becomes a battle of wills ending in ruin.
Kane’s power struggle with Hearst turns journalistic rivalry into a lonely quest for dominance.
Mobsters Tommy and Henry’s quest for kingpin status spirals into betrayal and destruction.
A tycoon and photographer clash in an ego-driven duel where obsession trumps reason.
